description_long: This house features a minimalist, modern cubic design with two main rectangular volumes, one taller and one shorter, set on a dark, textured base that resembles a wooden platform. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light gray material, likely concrete or stucco, giving it a contemporary appearance. The front facade includes a simple, dark door and a set of three square windows arranged in a row above the door, while the adjacent volume has an open garage-like space. The roof is flat and adorned with several tall, white poles topped with colorful, faceted geometric ornaments, adding a whimsical, artistic touch. The windows are framed in black, contrasting with the light walls, and the overall structure is compact and boxy. The house lacks visible steps, porches, or decorative trim, emphasizing clean lines and geometric simplicity.
description: A modern, boxy house with flat roofs, gray exterior, and whimsical colorful geometric ornaments on poles. Features a dark door, square windows, and an open garage-like space.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the taller volume with a flat roof and two colorful ornaments on poles, with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entry door, three square windows above it, an open garage-like space, and five colorful ornaments on poles atop the roofs.
description_view_2: The back side of the house reveals the flat roofs and the arrangement of the ornaments, with the open garage space partially visible.
description_view_3: The side view highlights the two main boxy volumes, the flat roofs, and the distribution of the colorful ornaments, with no windows or doors visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no steps or porch, minimalistic and unadorned
